title: Document FeedRepository.getUserFeed for TypeScript
description: FeedRepository.getUserFeed exists in the TS SDK (packages/sdk/src/feedRepository/observers/getUserFeed.ts) but is not documented anywhere. The query-posts.mdx page has user feed sections using PostRepository patterns, but FeedRepository.getUserFeed is a distinct live-collection API. Add a TypeScript code block showing FeedRepository.getUserFeed({ userId, feedSources: ['user', 'community'] }, callback) in the appropriate page (likely query-posts.mdx or a dedicated user-feed page).

success_criteria.description: query-posts.mdx has a TypeScript block using FeedRepository.getUserFeed with correct params (userId, feedSources)
